# Icones oficiais usados no diagrama

As libs/serviços principais representados no desenho hoje são estes, com base no manifesto oficial de ícones AWS:

- Amazon API Gateway
  - asset oficial: `Res_Amazon-API-Gateway_Endpoint_48.png`
  - asset local: `assets/aws-icons/api-gateway-endpoint.png`
- AWS Lambda
  - asset oficial: `Res_AWS-Lambda_Lambda-Function_48.png`
  - asset local: `assets/aws-icons/lambda-function.png`
- Amazon DynamoDB
  - asset oficial: `Res_Amazon-DynamoDB_Table_48.png`
  - asset local: `assets/aws-icons/dynamodb-table.png`
- Amazon S3
  - asset oficial: `Res_Amazon-Simple-Storage-Service_S3-Standard_48.png`
  - asset local: `assets/aws-icons/s3-standard.png`
- Amazon SQS
  - asset oficial: `Res_Amazon-Simple-Queue-Service_Queue_48.png`
  - asset local: `assets/aws-icons/sqs-queue.png`
- AWS Identity and Access Management
  - asset oficial: `Res_AWS-Identity-Access-Management_Role_48.png`
  - asset local: `assets/aws-icons/iam-role.png`
- Amazon CloudWatch Logs
  - asset oficial: `Res_Amazon-CloudWatch_Logs_48.png`
  - asset local: `assets/aws-icons/cloudwatch-logs.png`

Fonte oficial:
- página: https://aws.amazon.com/architecture/icons/
- pacote: https://d1.awsstatic.com/onedam/marketing-channels/website/aws/en_US/architecture/approved/architecture-icons/Icon-package_04302026.4705b90f5aa45b019271a2699e9ce9b97b941ee1.zip

- `diagrams/generated/iam-operational-serverless-lab-official-icons.generated.svg`
- `diagrams/generated/iam-operational-serverless-lab-official-icons.generated.png`
